Launched on March 12th, 2026. The move from prompt filtering to action governance is the right edge to own for agentic support and ops workflows. I'd use this in front of an agent that can touch tickets, refunds, or internal APIs, where a blocked action needs to be explainable to the team. When SolonGate denies an API call, does it return a policy-level reason that can be logged back into the agent trace?

results.title: any self hosted alternatives to twingate? : r/selfhosted
results.content: Skip to main contentany self hosted alternatives to twingate? Sign UpSign up for RedditLog InLog in to Reddit. Any recommendations for a self hosted version of twin gate? I work on the project, it's open source, which means it can be self-hosted. Twingate free version is also undercut in terms of users, i mean they offer two other versions, one for up 100 users and other of up 500. They could go with up to 50 for free users, 250 for teams and 500 as is for business. Yes, OpenZiti takes more time to set up; that's the nature of the beast with free and open source. I would also note that Ziti is a little more complicated, but this is because it can support more use cases. I have not personally used Twingate, but my knowledge of using Ziti informs me that the initial investment of setting up the infra is a heavy lift, so it should be straightforward.

results.title: The Best Oracle GoldenGate Alternatives for Real-Time CDC - Striim
results.content: # The Best Oracle GoldenGate Alternatives for Real-Time CDC. Oracle GoldenGate has long been the “safe” choice for high-stakes data replication. It’s powerful, it’s proven, and it’s a staple in the world’s largest data centers. But for many modern enterprise companies, that “safety” comes with a heavy price tag and a level of complexity that feels increasingly out of step with the speed of the AI era. Whether you’re drowning in licensing costs, struggling with a specialized setup that takes months to deploy, or finding that your legacy infrastructure can’t keep up with cloud-native requirements, you aren’t alone. The need for real-time data hasn’t changed, but the way we move it has. We’ll compare cloud-native solutions, self-hosted platforms, and open-source alternatives to help you find a strategy that fits your architecture, your budget, and your need for speed. ## What Are Real-Time Data Replication Platforms? Real-time data replication platforms are the heartbeat of a modern, event-driven architecture. It’s a comprehensive solution for real-time data replication in complex, heterogeneous environments.
